resource.description: The resource is gonna fire the event

cancellation.description: When subscribed to this resource, you will be notified of cancellations of the user's subscribers

dispute.description: When subscribed to this resource, you will be notified of the disputes raised against user's sales

dispute_won.description: When subscribed to this resource, you will be notified of the sale disputes won

refund.description: When subscribed to this resource, you will be notified of refunds to the user's sales

sale.description: When subscribed to this resource, you will be notified of the user's sales
